message:
fix(e2e): filter corrupt/invalid fixtures from compatibility baseline

Add discover_compatibility_baseline_golden_files() that reads fixture
metadata and excludes those tagged invalid/corrupt from baseline
validation, preventing false failures on intentionally-broken fixtures.

Switch smoke checks and integration tests to baseline-only validation.
New test: known_bad_fixtures_are_tagged_in_metadata.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
